scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points: type: oci-image, containers/resources linking, description field. Misses upstream-source field mentioned in gold standard but otherwise complete.
scores.hallucination_notes: The deploy-time usage 'juju deploy --resource my-app-image=<image>' and 'charmcraft upload-resource' are real commands but not in the gold standard scope — these are correct. Minor issue: gold standard notes upstream-source is 'very commonly included' but response omits it entirely, which is an omission not a hallucination. No fabricated APIs detected.
